offer: For Shopify sellers processing 10–50 sales commissions/week, delayed reconciliation causes cash flow gaps. We automate commission reconciliation instead of manual reconciliation and sporadic payout summaries.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for Shopify sellers
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions about workflows
DM outreach to Shopify sellers with demo video
Contribute in community forums for Shopify tools
try_it: Let users try Manual commission entry and Weekly payout summary generation on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video for manual workflow
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Enable CSV import for existing data
Allow one-click export of simple reports
